description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during Ching Ming Festival and Easter holidays period
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 清明節/復活節假期跨境陸路口岸出行的有關安排/注意事項

2026-04-05T17:43:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points (BCPs) tomorrow and the day after (6 & 7 April 2026). The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and be patient as it is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the inbound peak period and the waiting time would be longer. The TD has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The TD's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based BCPs, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk) and “HKeMobility”. Inbound drivers using Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) are reminded to reserve sufficient travelling time and be patient in queue. The public may check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the “hzmbzhport” or hzhuaifabu” WeChat official accounts (https://traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/), in order to plan their journeys ahead.
2026-04-05T17:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計明日及後日(2026年4月6日及7日)將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長，請乘客耐心等候。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸的公共運輸服務情況，並會透過運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。 運輸署特別提醒使用港珠澳大橋珠海口岸返港的駕駛人士，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。以便及早計劃行程。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced MTR service during the Easter and Ching Ming Holidays
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港鐵復活節及清明節假期加強服務

2026-04-08T02:14:00.CONTENT_EN: The MTR Bus K52A service between Tuen Mun Station and Tsang Tsui Columbarium will be enhanced for the follwoing period: - 11 – 12 and 18 – 19 April: Increased frequency with extended service hours Please click MTR's website for more information.
2026-04-08T02:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 港鐵巴士K52A路綫來往屯門站及曾咀靈灰安置所將於以下時段加強服務: -4月11、12、18、19日：延長服務時間及加密班次 詳情參閲港鐵網頁。
